source_text: -sty 1 is used which is compatible with TURBOMOLE. From our experience the flag -sty 2 works for MOLPRO inputs, while -sty 3 works for both TERACHEM, GAUS- SIAN (via g2molden, see below) or Q-CHEM (via qc2molden.sh, see below) input files. After you ran the check, you can run the actual calculation by running the program without the -chk flag, but using the respective -sty flag as well as the options pre- sented below.

spans.content: -sty 1 is used which is compatible with TURBOMOLE. From our experience the flag
-sty 2 works for MOLPRO inputs, while -sty 3 works for both TERACHEM, GAUS-
SIAN (via g2molden, see below) or Q-CHEM (via qc2molden.sh, see below) input files.
After you ran the check, you can run the actual calculation by running the program
without the -chk flag, but using the respective -sty flag as well as the options pre-
sented below.

protected_source_text: -sty 1 is used which is compatible with TURBOMOLE. From our experience the flag -sty 2 works for MOLPRO inputs, while -sty 3 works for both TERACHEM, GAUS- SIAN (via g2molden, see below) or Q-CHEM (via qc2molden.sh, see below) input files. After you ran the check, you can run the actual calculation by running the program without the -chk flag, but using the respective -sty flag as well as the options pre- sented below.
protected_translated_text: -sty 1 选项用于兼容 TURBOMOLE。根据我们的经验，-sty 2 适用于 MOLPRO 输入文件，而 -sty 3 则适用于 TERACHEM、GAUSSIAN（通过 g2molden，见下文）或 Q-CHEM（通过 qc2molden.sh，见下文）输入文件。完成检查后，您可以通过运行不带 -chk 标志的程序来执行实际计算，但需同时使用相应的 -sty 标志以及下文列出的选项。
translated_text: -sty 1 选项用于兼容 TURBOMOLE。根据我们的经验，-sty 2 适用于 MOLPRO 输入文件，而 -sty 3 则适用于 TERACHEM、GAUSSIAN（通过 g2molden，见下文）或 Q-CHEM（通过 qc2molden.sh，见下文）输入文件。完成检查后，您可以通过运行不带 -chk 标志的程序来执行实际计算，但需同时使用相应的 -sty 标志以及下文列出的选项。

spans.content: -ax <amount of Fock exchange>

source_text: Specifies the amount of Fock exchange in the density functional (e.g. -ax 0.25 for PBE0).

spans.content: Specifies the amount of Fock exchange in the density functional (e.g. -ax 0.25 for
PBE0).

protected_source_text: Specifies the amount of Fock exchange in the density functional (e.g. -ax 0.25 for PBE0).
protected_translated_text: 指定密度泛函中Fock交换的占比（例如，PBE0使用-ax 0.25）。
translated_text: 指定密度泛函中Fock交换的占比（例如，PBE0使用-ax 0.25）。

spans.content: -e <Ethr>

source_text: This specifies the energy threshold (in eV) for configurations to be considered in sTDA or sTD-DFT or SF-sTD-DFT or XsTDA or XsTD-DFT procedures. Important con- figurations beyond the threshold are selected by perturbation theory and added to the configuration space (see Ref. 1 for details). The default value is 7 eV and it is recom- mended to adjust this threshold depending on the energy range of interest.

spans.content: This specifies the energy threshold (in eV) for configurations to be considered in sTDA
or sTD-DFT or SF-sTD-DFT or XsTDA or XsTD-DFT procedures. Important con-
figurations beyond the threshold are selected by perturbation theory and added to the
configuration space (see Ref. 1 for details). The default value is 7 eV and it is recom-
mended to adjust this threshold depending on the energy range of interest.

protected_source_text: This specifies the energy threshold (in eV) for configurations to be considered in sTDA or sTD-DFT or SF-sTD-DFT or XsTDA or XsTD-DFT procedures. Important con- figurations beyond the threshold are selected by perturbation theory and added to the configuration space (see Ref. 1 for details). The default value is 7 eV and it is recom- mended to adjust this threshold depending on the energy range of interest.
protected_translated_text: 这指定了在sTDA、sTD-DFT、SF-sTD-DFT、XsTDA或XsTD-DFT程序中考虑构型所需的能量阈值（以eV为单位）。超出该阈值的重要构型将通过微扰理论进行选择，并添加到构型空间中（详见参考文献1）。默认值为7 eV，建议根据感兴趣的能量范围调整此阈值。
translated_text: 这指定了在sTDA、sTD-DFT、SF-sTD-DFT、XsTDA或XsTD-DFT程序中考虑构型所需的能量阈值（以eV为单位）。超出该阈值的重要构型将通过微扰理论进行选择，并添加到构型空间中（详见参考文献1）。默认值为7 eV，建议根据感兴趣的能量范围调整此阈值。

spans.content: 3.2 Optional Features
-libcintOFF

source_text: Since version 2.0.0, std2 uses the libcint integral library [23] to compute one- and two- electron integrals. This keyword can trigger the use of the old integral library. This option is not available for XsTD methods.

spans.content: Since version 2.0.0, std2 uses the libcint integral library [23] to compute one- and two-
electron integrals. This keyword can trigger the use of the old integral library. This
option is not available for XsTD methods.

protected_source_text: Since version 2.0.0, std2 uses the libcint integral library [23] to compute one- and two- electron integrals. This keyword can trigger the use of the old integral library. This option is not available for XsTD methods.
protected_translated_text: 自版本2.0.0起，std2使用libcint积分库[23]来计算单电子和双电子积分。此关键词可触发使用旧积分库。此选项不适用于XsTD方法。
translated_text: 自版本2.0.0起，std2使用libcint积分库[23]来计算单电子和双电子积分。此关键词可触发使用旧积分库。此选项不适用于XsTD方法。

spans.content: -XsTD

source_text: To trigger the use of XsTD methods instead of sTD ones considering global hybrid functionals. Note that XsTD schemes are not available using an xTB ground state. Note also that for XsTDA calculations, the velocity correction is deactivated by default but can be triggered using the -Bvel keyword.

spans.content: To trigger the use of XsTD methods instead of sTD ones considering global hybrid
functionals. Note that XsTD schemes are not available using an xTB ground state.
Note also that for XsTDA calculations, the velocity correction is deactivated by default
but can be triggered using the -Bvel keyword.

protected_source_text: To trigger the use of XsTD methods instead of sTD ones considering global hybrid functionals. Note that XsTD schemes are not available using an xTB ground state. Note also that for XsTDA calculations, the velocity correction is deactivated by default but can be triggered using the -Bvel keyword.
protected_translated_text: 为考虑全局杂化泛函而触发使用XsTD方法而非sTD方法。注意：使用xTB基态时无法使用XsTD方案。另请注意：对于XsTDA计算，默认情况下速度校正处于关闭状态，但可通过-Bvel关键词触发。
translated_text: 为考虑全局杂化泛函而触发使用XsTD方法而非sTD方法。注意：使用xTB基态时无法使用XsTD方案。另请注意：对于XsTDA计算，默认情况下速度校正处于关闭状态，但可通过-Bvel关键词触发。
